userStories.title: Voice naturalness testing and selection
userStories.description: Test Chirp3-HD, ElevenLabs, and Deepgram Aura voices. Record 5 test calls with each. Measure naturalness, latency, interruption handling. Pick winner and deploy.
acceptanceCriteria: Test script exists with 5 test scenarios
Winner selected based on naturalness score 8+/10

userStories.title: Self-service signup form UI
userStories.description: Build signup form with email, password, business name, industry dropdown (9 verticals). Include template picker. Clean, professional UI.
acceptanceCriteria: Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: User authentication system
userStories.description: Implement signup/login with email + password. Store users in SQLite. Session management with JWT. Protect dashboard routes.

userStories.title: Twilio phone number auto-provisioning
userStories.description: On signup, auto-provision Twilio phone number for the business. Store phone number in database. Configure webhook to route calls to user's AI.

userStories.title: Template customization flow
userStories.description: After signup, show customization page: business greeting (text), hours (time picker), top 3 FAQs (text areas), personality slider (formal ↔ friendly).
acceptanceCriteria: AI uses custom settings on calls
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Dashboard skeleton with navigation
userStories.description: Build dashboard layout with sidebar nav: Calls, Analytics, Settings, Billing. Empty pages with placeholders. Professional design.
acceptanceCriteria: Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Call history page
userStories.description: Display table of calls: date, time, caller, duration, status. Click row → see transcript + recording player. Export to CSV.
acceptanceCriteria: Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Analytics dashboard
userStories.description: Display cards: total calls today/week/month. Chart: daily call volume (last 30 days). Average call duration metric.
acceptanceCriteria: Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Settings page (edit greeting/hours/FAQs)
userStories.description: Settings page where business owner can edit greeting, hours, FAQs, personality. Save button → updates live AI immediately.
acceptanceCriteria: Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Stripe payment integration
userStories.description: Add Stripe Checkout for $99/mo subscription. Payment successful → activate account. Billing page shows subscription status.
